0.q: The reaction catalyzed by this gene product provided the carbon source for glycerol metabolism in D. salina, thus the alga could live in an extreme environment.
The expression of DsALDP led to an increase in aldolase activity and hence accumulation of glycerol.

1.q: Yeast two-hybrid analysis showed that DsMEK1-X2 could interact with DsMAPKKK1/2/3/9/10/17 and DsMAPK1; however, DsMEK1-X1 interacted with neither upstream MAPKKK nor downstream MAPK.

2.q: Yeast two-hybrid analysis showed that DsMEK1-X2 could interact with DsMAPKKK1/2/3/9/10/17 and DsMAPK1.

8.q: DsGPDH6 was upregulated in the DsMEK1-X2-RNAi strains and control lines, and DsGPDH6 was speculated to be negatively regulated by DsMEK1-X2 under salt stress.

9.q: DsGPDH2/3/5 genes were upregulated in the DsMEK1-X2-oe strains compared to the control under salt stress... DsMEK1-X2 can positively regulate DsGPDH2/3/5 expression

10.q: DsMEK1-X2 can positively regulate DsGPDH2/3/5 expression and thus glycerol synthesis under salt stress

11.q: DsMEK1-X2 can positively regulate DsGPDH2/3/5 expression and thus glycerol synthesis under salt stress

12.q: SOD catalyzes the turnover of such free radicals to protect cells... It indicated that DsMnSOD could protect cells from damage by superoxide anion accumulation.
